rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF IN RE REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST AGREEMENT OF CHARLES ACTIS/CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NO. PES-05-287457
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Motion For Order Directing Compliance With Subpoena, Alternatively Excluding The Testimony Of Chantay Allmond And For Expenses Of The Motion
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MARCH 1, 2007, PETITIONER CAROL MITCHELL'S MOTION FOR ORDER DIRECTING COMPLIANCE WITH SUBPOENA IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 21, 2007 PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. =(612/EAH)
